headline: P&L exposure: ₹14.4 Cr direct revenue loss + ₹1.0 Cr workforce impact (engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; margin impact is direct from operational performance, not supplier or customer disruption.
P/E compression of 0.0-0.1x possible; ₹15.4 Cr at risk (engine estimate) due to margin erosion and earnings revision.
Cost of capital could rise by 20-40 bps if BRSR/TCFD disclosure lapses persist (from ontology), but current event is not a direct trigger.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹14.4 Cr direct revenue loss + ₹1.0 Cr workforce impact (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹14.4 Cr direct (engine estimate) + ₹1.0 Cr indirect workforce impact (engine estimate)
